title: anti chest esp donut smp
description: DonutAntiChestESP Advanced Chest Visibility Protection for Minecraft Servers
body:
🍩 DonutAntiChestESP
Advanced Chest Visibility Protection for Minecraft Servers

Stop cheaters from exploiting ESP hacks to locate your chests — silently, efficiently, server-side.
the plugin also adds the commands: /sklepzawalute (this is shop) for currency and /clan, but this is only an addition and is not a priority

WARNING: Players with OPerator status (OP) or the donutantiesp.bypass permission will NOT see the Anti-ESP effect. They will always see real blocks and ores to facilitate server administration. To test if the plugin is working correctly, you must de-op yourself or use an account without permissions.


📋 Overview
DonutAntiChestESP is a lightweight yet powerful anti-cheat plugin designed to neutralize Chest ESP (Extra Sensory Perception) exploits used by cheaters to locate hidden storage containers through walls and terrain. By dynamically controlling chest packet transmission based on player proximity and render distance, this plugin ensures that only legitimate players can see chests — exactly when they're supposed to.

⚙️ How It Works
The plugin intercepts and manages chunk and block entity packets sent to each player. Chest block entities are hidden from the client until the player enters a configurable proximity threshold, preventing ESP clients from rendering chest locations they have no business knowing about.
Render distance offset is fully adjustable from -1 to +2 chunks, giving server admins precise control over when chest data is transmitted relative to the player's current render range:
OffsetEffect-1Chests hidden 1 chunk beyond view range — maximum stealth0Chests revealed exactly at the player's render edge+1Chests sent 1 chunk earlier than render distance+2Chests visible 2 chunks ahead of render — smoother experience

🛡️ Key Features

Chest ESP Blocking — Suppresses block entity packets for all chest types (Chest, Trapped Chest, Barrel, Shulker Box, Ender Chest) until the player is within safe range
Dynamic Packet Management — Continuously tracks player movement and adjusts visibility in real time, with no client-side mods required
Configurable Render Offset — Fine-tune visibility range from -1 to +2 chunks via config.yml
Multi-Container Support — Covers all common storage containers to close every ESP loophole
Zero Client Impact — Fully server-side; compatible with vanilla clients
Async Processing — Non-blocking packet handling ensures no TPS impact even on large servers
Per-World Configuration — Apply different protection settings per world
Bypass Permission — Grant trusted staff/admins a permission node to bypass restrictions


🔧 Compatibility

Server software: Paper, Purpur, Spigot (1.19–1.21+)
